violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Limited time Moana plastic drink cups are stored under the Subway hand washing sink. Advise moving the product to a safer location to prevent contamination.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Guacamole was being thawed in a pan in the sink with no running water

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Repackaged seafood pasta salad in the display case by the cheese was dated for November 21, 2025. This exceeds the ten days allowed under food code.

Reduced-oxygen packaging. — --Establishment using reduced-oxygen process was not properly labeling the food packages. Vacuum sealed deli meats in the grocery cold case was dated for February 3rd, 2026.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Pizza boxes by the reach in freezer and foam plates by the rotating food warmer were not inverted.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee phone was stored in paper boats on the prep counter by the reach in freezer.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
